# TekkaBuzz.win

> Bangladesh's #1 Online Casino — Live Casino, Sports Betting, Slots, Crash Games

## About
TekkaBuzz.win is Bangladesh's premier online gaming platform with 29M+ registered players and 6,300+ games. Also known as Taka Buzz, Tekka Buzz, TkkaBuzz, TekkaBaz, TakkaBuzz.

## Official Website
https://www.tekkabuzz.win

## Key Features
- Live Casino: Baccarat, Roulette, Blackjack, Teen Patti, Dragon Tiger
- Sports Betting: IPL, BPL, EPL, Champions League with live in-play betting
- 6,300+ Slots from JILI, PG Soft, CQ9, Habanero, NetEnt
- Crash Games, Fishing, Lottery, Arcade, Table Games
- 20,000 Taka Welcome Bonus
- Instant deposits/withdrawals via bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Upay, Crypto

## Payment Methods
bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Upay, TAP, SureCash, iPay, OkWallet, Bank Card, Cryptocurrency

## Affiliate Program
Earn 300 Taka per referral with no limits. Visit https://www.tekkabuzz.win/affiliate

## Support
- 24/7 Live Chat
- WhatsApp: +88019000000
- Email: support@tekkabuzz.win
